title: Leaderboards Update
newFeatures: Career Rankings leaderboard with driver levels and lifetime stats
Track Records and Sprint Records boards with gap-to-leader timing
Personal Bests section with separate Formula records
Driver nicknames with persistent anonymous identity
Shared online leaderboards (Netlify-hosted, automatic for all players)
Vehicle class recognition on all record boards
improvements: Leaderboards are human-only — AI opponents no longer appear
Offline-first sync: records set offline upload on the next visit
Server-side validation of submitted times and stats
bugFixes: Best laps set on the final lap of a race are now recorded correctly

title: Formula Racing Update
newFeatures: AX-1 Formula — unlockable open-wheel car (7,500 cr)
Formula Series: formula-only grids when racing the AX-1
Time Trial mode with instant restart (R) and session lap history
Motorsport sector timing with PB color coding (S1/S2/S3)
Live lap delta against your personal-best lap
improvements: AI with better brakes now commit deeper into corners
Sierra Canyon pre-selects Sprint mode as designed

title: Drive4Apex — Motorsport Tracks
newFeatures: Apex International Circuit — GP venue with hairpin, esses and chicane
Greenwood Endurance Raceway — forest straights and a blind crest
Sierra Canyon Run — high-desert sprint with tunnel and gorge bridge
Track landmarks: curbs, grandstands, tunnels and bridges
New Drive4Apex identity, logo and wordmark
bugFixes: Fixed inverted steering — left now steers left, right steers right
Initial start-line crossing no longer counts as a best lap

title: Initial Release
newFeatures: Three themed tracks with circuit and sprint race modes
Six cars with distinct stats and ten unlockable paint colors
Seven AI opponents with three difficulty levels
Credits progression saved locally
Synthesized engine, effects and music — zero downloads
Desktop keyboard and mobile touch controls
